design_philosophy: Apple-level minimalism meets cinematic outdoor grandeur. The app acts as a premium digital compass. Dark, immersive hero moments pull the user in, while stark, crisp, light-mode functional screens ensure frictionless planning. High contrast, generous negative space, and premium photography.

typography.font_family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif

cinematic_hero_screen.layout: Full-bleed absolute background image taking 100% device height.
cinematic_hero_screen.overlay: Linear gradient from bottom to top: rgba(8,11,9,1) 0%, rgba(8,11,9,0.5) 40%, rgba(8,11,9,0) 100%.
cinematic_hero_screen.content: Bottom-aligned within a SafeAreaView. Large H1 text, Overline above it, Pill-shaped primary CTA at the bottom.
cinematic_hero_screen.cta: Glassmorphism if light background, or solid Accent (#FF5C35) for maximum contrast.

trip_planner_form.container: White background, large border-radius top-left and top-right (Modal/Bottom Sheet style).
trip_planner_form.inputs: No floating labels. Use clear, bold labels. Input backgrounds #F8F9F8, border #E6E9E6, rounded-md.
trip_planner_form.slider: Apple-style thick track, Primary brand color (#235E3B) fill.

park_detail_card.container: Large margin-bottom. rounded-lg (24px). Background white. Soft shadow-md.
park_detail_card.hero_image: Top of card, aspect-ratio 4:3 or 16:9. No inner padding for image (flush to edges).
park_detail_card.typography: Park Name (H3), State (Overline in muted text).
park_detail_card.trails_list: Horizontal scroll view of small pills or cards below the main info.
park_detail_card.parallax_note: Image inside card should have a subtle parallax effect on vertical scroll if possible.

cost_estimator_card.style: Apple Card aesthetic: Flat white background, delicate 1px border (#E6E9E6), minimalist icons.
cost_estimator_card.data_display: Large metric numbers (H2) paired with small Overline labels.

collection_grid.unvisited_state: Grayscale filter on image + dark overlay. Locked icon in corner.
collection_grid.visited_state: Full color, bright vibrance. Accent-colored checkmark badge.

achievement_toast.container: Floating island at top of screen. Pill shaped. Blur background (Chrome material).
achievement_toast.animation: Spring drop-down from top edge, hold 3s, fade up.

icons.usage: Use thin or regular weights. No filled icons unless active/selected.

hero_backgrounds.description: Yosemite mountain surrounded by trees under cloudy sky

badges.description: Stylish gold compass badge for achievements

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (or testID for React Native). Format: kebab-case, role-based. Example: testID='plan-trip-cta-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React Native / Expo standards.
Implement navigation using Expo Router (tabs and stacks).
Use Tailwind (NativeWind) or StyleSheet for styling, strictly mapping to the provided color palette and spacing scale.
Ensure 'Home' is a dark cinematic hero screen. The 'Planner' should be a light-themed modal or screen for high legibility.
Build the Collection Grid to visually separate 'visited' (color) from 'unvisited' (grayscale/muted).
Integrate seamless animations for route tracking and achievements using Reanimated or core Animated API.
Do not use generic emojis. Use @expo/vector-icons.
Always apply testID to interactive elements.
